message:
fix: add dolt.idle-timeout default for Gas Town centralized Dolt

Gas Town uses a centralized Dolt server (systemd-managed). Per-rig
idle-monitors were spawning duplicate Dolt instances (~150MB RAM each).

Sets dolt.idle-timeout: "0" as default in EnsureConfigYAML for all rigs.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2600
Author: ChicK00o (Rohit Bhosle)

Co-authored-by: Rohit Bhosle <mail@rohitbhosle.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
